title: NMO
description: This modpack includes many interesting mods and optimizations. You can use it to build your own rail transit system and construct various buildings. I'm thrilled that you can play with my modpack. Have fun and enjoy your gameplay! Thank you!
body:
# Related links
[Bilibili](https://space.bilibili.com/3546800931736521)
Self-made MTR integration package
This modpack includes many interesting mods and optimizations. You can use it to build your own rail transit system and construct various buildings. I'm thrilled that you can play with my modpack. Have fun and enjoy your gameplay! Thank you!

My QQ number is: 2825266179

Tiktok number: zyy95720.
# Minimum Requirements
Memory:Not less than 8G
CPU:i3 4170
graphics card:HD Graphics 4400
# Precautions
We are not responsible for any damage caused to your device

# 相关链接
哔哩哔哩https://space.bilibili.com/3546800931736521)
自制MTR 和 机械动力整合包
此整合包里包含了许多有趣的模组，还有很多优化，你可以用它建造属于你自己的轨道交通系统，你还可以用它建造许多建筑，我很开心你们能玩到我的整合包，祝您玩的开心，玩的快乐，感谢！
QQ号码：2825266179

抖音号：zyy95720。
# 最低配置要求
内存：不小于8G
CPU：i34170
图形显示卡：HD graphics 4400
